# Dink Club — Miami Pickleball Facility
# https://dinkclub.com

> Dink Club is an outdoor pickleball facility in Kendall, Miami (10855 SW 112nd Ave, Miami, FL 33176)
> with 6 courts offering open play, court reservations, lessons, clinics, tournaments, leagues, and private events.
> Court rental: $20/hour, pay-as-you-play, no membership. Open Monday–Sunday, by reservation. Phone: 305-813-4238.
> Rated 5.0 stars across 28 Google reviews.

## Key Pages
- /: Overview and facility intro
- /pages/court-reservations: Book a court ($20/hr via CourtReserve)
- /pages/open-play: Drop-in sessions by skill level
- /pages/lessons: Private, semi-private, and group coaching (Coach Pillo; guest pro Lorena Duknic)
- /pages/clinics: Structured skill clinics, all levels
- /pages/tournaments: Tournaments, the Dink Club Pickleball League (DCPL); DUPR-rated divisions
- /pages/faq: Hours, pricing, booking, court rules
- /pages/new-to-pickleball: Beginner guide and skill-level chart
- /pages/dupr: What DUPR is and how ratings work
- /pages/about: Facility story and community focus
- /pages/contact: Address, map, phone, contact form

## Excluded
- /dashboard.html (private content editor)
- /admin/ (staff only)
